prompt: (9:16). Raw high-fidelity photograph, Low-angle worm's-eye perspective looking directly upward, Medium close-up environmental portrait, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 24mm wide-angle lens, f/8 aperture for total structural depth, zero bokeh, everything SHARP, authentic digital grain. Medium close-up selfie; subject occupies approximately 50% of the frame, positioned in the lower center. Negative space: The upper 50% of the frame is dominated by the converging iron beams of a monumental tower; clear blue sky is visible through the iron latticework. Camera distance: Approximately 0.5 meters (arm's length) from the subject. Identity Lock: "Inherit ALL permanent facial features (face shape, bone structure, eye shape/color, nose shape, lip shape/volume, chin structure, skin tone, hair texture/color/volume, freckles, moles, and distinguishing marks) from the provided selfie." Photogenic Enhancement: Maximum epidermal clarity with natural texture preserved, even chromatic skin distribution, natural skin radiance with soft luminosity, periorbital brightness, gently refined jawline contour through natural shadow placement, subtly streamlined nasal highlight, slight vermilion border definition with minimal volume enhancement, soft zygomatic highlight through natural light placement, enhanced iris luminosity with natural catchlights, defined lash separation with natural density, naturally groomed brow arches, clean pearl-white dental luminosity, salon-finish hair texture with controlled flyaway management, lustrous strand separation with natural body. Bio-Fidelity: Epidermal physics including micro-pores on the nose and cheeks, fine vellus hair along the jawline, and a satin-finish hydration on the décolletage. Expression Sync: Apply a "dreamy and awe-inspired" expression to the selfie's face; gaze is directed toward the upper-left (approximately 45 degrees off-camera); lips are in a soft, relaxed neutral pout; head is tilted upward and turned toward her left shoulder. Hair: Inherit hair color and texture from the provided selfie; long, straight, layered hair with dynamic wind-blown physics; loose strands falling messily across the face and forehead; hair cascades over both shoulders and down the chest; high-intensity midday sunlight creating sharp specular highlights and detailed strand separation. Makeup: Natural travel aesthetic: minimalist foundation with natural skin texture preserved, defined lashes, subtle hydration on the lips. Accessories: Delicate thin silver-tone chain necklace. Outfit: Strapless tube-style crop top in a high-tensile rib-knit textile, soft baby-pink; paired with high-waisted technical shorts in crisp white fabric with gathered elastic waistband; realistic material tension and micro-folds across the bust; 20% enhanced definition of the waist-to-hip ratio and collarbone geometry; hyper-defined S-curve silhouette. Pose & Interaction: Torso leaning forward and downward toward the camera lens; head tilted upward and turned left; right arm extended downward holding the camera; relaxed shoulders; realistic finger articulation; skin-on-textile contact physics. Mood: Dreamy, adventurous, awe-inspired; palette: baby-pink, iron-brown, cerulean blue, crisp white; clear saturated blue sky; natural 5500K daylight wash; high contrast with sharp directional sunlight and defined shadows/highlights. Environment: Outdoors beneath the Eiffel Tower; intense direct sunlight illuminating face and chest; pixel-perfect underside of Eiffel Tower with intricate brown iron latticework, rivets, converging beams; cloudless deep blue sky; all surfaces sharp and structurally realistic.
